event_info: Boult starts with the inswinger; but he slides it well down leg and is called as a wide
on a good length and a hint of nip back into the right-hander - Rahane shuffles across and defends it to the on-side
on a good length and just outside off - Rahane leans across and defends it with an open face to backward point
fuller length delivery and well wide of off; past Rahane's swish; but it's past the tramlines and is called as a wide
crunched; on a good length and just outside off; it's right in the slot and Rahane brings his wrists into play; whips it over wide mid-on for a maximum
fuller length delivery outside off - Rahane presses half-forward and stabs it to mid-off
nicely played; the inswinger; but it's on the pads and it's clipped behind square on the on-side; was racing away until Dhir's diving effort in the deep; pulls it back and keeps them down to a couple
fuller length delivery outside off - Rahane leans across and push-drives it to mid-off
fuller length delivery around off - Allen leans across and defends it back at the bowler
fraction fuller and just outside off - Allen prods forward and drives it back at the bowler. Pandya bends down low on the followthrough and makes the stop
short of a good length and just outside off - Allen stays back on the whippy drive; can't place it into the gap though; straight to the fielder at mid-off
streaky and four; short of a good length and just outside off - Allen swings across the line; gets a thick inside edge and the ball runs away behind square on the on-side for a boundary
on a good length and just outside off - punched off the back-foot to mid-off
a swing and a miss; short of a good length and just outside off; wasn't short enough for the pull and Allen is beaten on the inside edge. Didn't miss the off-stump by much
tossed up and drifting into the right-hander; clipped behind square on the on-side - Rahane wanted a second and is sent back
tossed up on middle and leg - Allen goes back and picks out square leg with the flick
clubbed; dropped short and at the stumps - Allen rocks back; picks the length early and pulls it backward of square on the on-side for a boundary
hammered; sheer power from Allen - fraction short and at the stumps; Allen picks the length early; rocks back and then thumps the pull over wide mid-on - a 86m monster
half-an-appeal for LBW; but that was sliding down leg - was the wrong 'un; spins back and cramps Allen for room on the back-foot; struck on the pad; but the impact itself was outside leg
cracking shot; tad too short from Ghazanfar; he's struggled for consistency - drops one short and Allen is quick to pounce on it; goes back and heaves the pull over deep mid-wicket. 17 off the over
this is a good start now for KKR - a proper hit-me ball from Hardik; too full and down leg; Rahane gets inside the line; uses the pace and then flicks it over long leg for a maximum
back-to-back sixes for Rahane; Hardik drags the length back; but it's down leg with the angle and Rahane helps it on its way with the swivel pull; over square leg and sails overe the ropes
1 run; on a good length and angling into the right-hander; Rahane was looking to flick and missed; off the pad and dropped to the on-side - Finn Allen calls his partner across for a quick single
beautifully played; back of a length and at the stumps - Allen is quick to go back; rolled his wrists and then pulled it past square leg; short boundary and the ball races away
banged in short; but it's down leg and is called as a wide
smashed; a proper half-volley now; full and at the stumps; Allen drills it back past the non-striker and the ball races away to the straight boundary; brings up KKR's 50
cheeky and four; short of a good length and just outside off - Allen shuffles across; gets inside the line and then helps it on its way; past short fine and it's a 26-run over
the bleeding continues; short of a good length and angling into the right-hander - Rahane gets inside the line; uses Bumrah's pace and then clips it behind square on the on-side for a boundary
on a length and at the stumps; tucked past square leg for a single

the slower ball and Allen gets away; didn't spot the change of pace from Bumrah - was the slower ball and he was through with the slog; gets a thick inside edge and the ball clears the man at mid-wicket
fraction fuller and just outside off - Allen stays back on the drive and mistimes it to mid-off; they're off for a quick single
on a good length and at the stumps; Rahane leans across and turns it to the on-side
the slower short ball from Bumrah - Rahane waits on it and dabs the pull past square leg for a single. 11 off Bumrah's first over
banged in short by Shardul - Rahane waits and then drags the pull behind square on the on-side for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Tilak Varma!! There's the wicket and MI badly needed this - was the slower ball from Shardul
event_info: floaty delivery outside off and Allen didn't back out on the shovel. But there's no pace on offer and he doesn't get the timing right; drags it off the inner half and holds out to Tilak at long-on. He's a safe fielder and completes the catch with ease. Finn Allen c Tilak Varma b Shardul Thakur 37(17) [4s-6 6s-2]
fuller length delivery outside off; pushed to the left of cover where the fielder makes a diving half-stop
beautifully played; all class from Ajinkya Rahane - on a good length and well wide of off; he waits on it and then caresses the drive through extra-cover for a boundary
short of a good length and just outside off - Rahane hacks it off the back-foot to mid-on
thumped; on a good length and well wide of off - Rahane leans across and then smashes it back over the umpire's head; runs away straight of mid-on
tossed up just outside off - punched down to long-off for a single
Markande tosses one just outside off - Rahane plays with a slightly open face and finds the gap to the left of cover; comes back for the second

a loud shout for LBW; but it might be sliding down leg - MI have reviewed - was the wrong 'un and Rahane played down the wrong line; was beaten on the inside edge. Clear gap between bat and ball; onto ball-tracking and it's going past leg-stump. MI have lost a review
hammered; pushed through outside off - Rahane stands tall and then hammers it high over the bowler's head; sails all the way over the ropes for a maximum
tossed up on off; whipped down to long-on for a single

massive; Green is into the action now - a floaty delivery around middle; was the attempted wrong 'un; but it's right in the slot as Green clears his arms; smotes it high over long-on for a maximum. 16 off the over
quicker and fuller; Rahane drives it down to long on
short and sliding on the pads; Green works it away to backward square leg
he's not got his length right tonight; slightly shorter outside off; Green punches it to sweeper cover
on the pads again; Rahane flicks it to backward square leg
slower and way down the leg side; Rahane leaves it
100 up in real time; sliding into the pads; Rahane works it away to square leg
full and outside off; Green drives it down to sweeper cover
slower short ball; Green stands tall and smashes it to long-off; he almost found the gap; but Tilak moves quickly and restricts to a couple
Boundaries are flowing here! short and outside off; Green backs away to the legside and cuts it past the fielder to deep backward point
speared in full on leg; Green flicks it to deep mid-wicket
Rahane tries to be cheeky; but Thakur outsmart him; Rahane moves away to the off side and tries the lap shot; but Shardul drags the length back and the ball goes off the inside edge to the off-side

ball_event: out Caught by Sherfane Rutherford!! The man with the golden arm has struck again
event_info: shorter and slower outside off; Green stands tall and looks to loft it over deep point; he couldn't find the distance and holes out to Rutherford in the deep; who dives forward and takes it inches from the ground;  The highest buy of the season started off well; but couldn't make a bigger impact. Cameron Green c Sherfane Rutherford b Shardul Thakur 18(10) [4s-1 6s-1]
back of a length and outside outside off; Raghuvanshi guides it to third man
full and on the pads; driven down to long-on
back of a length and angled across; fifty up for Rahane; he looks to guide to third man; it fell short of the fielder at short third as he couldn't stop it
angling into the pads; Raghuvanshi works it away to deep mid-wicket
this is a nice shot; nothing wrong with the delivery; length and just outside off; Raghuvanshi hangs back; opens the face of the bat and eases it past the fielder to deep backward point; pure timing!
on the pads; worked away to deep square leg
back of a length and on middle; Rahane mistimes a pull to deep square leg
we are seeing a different Rahane tonight; he'e picking the length beautifully; tossed up and outside off; Rahane gets down and smashes it over deep mid-wicket
quicker and on the pads; Rahane works it off his legs to mid-wicket; they run well for a couple
two more; sliding into the pads; Rahane once again flicks it in the gap to deep square leg
this one darted in quicker; Rahane pushes it to the right of the bowler
1 run; stifled appeal for an LBW; this was pushed through quicker; Rahane went for the sweep shot and misses it; that one would have went over the stumps
flatter and outside off; Raghuvanshi goes across the line and is hit on the body
short and angling into the body; Rahane hangs back and guides it to short third man for a quick single
slower yorker; giving nothing away; digs it down to long-on
pin-point yorker on off; Rahane can only push it away towards point for a single
another yorker; right on middle; Raghuvanshi can only push it back to the bowler
full and just outside off; accurate length; Raghuvanshi drives it down to long-on
he errs in length and bowls full on the pads; Rahane flicks it to deep mid-wicket; straight to the fielder
Boult is back again; full and on off; Rahane drives it towards the right of the bowler; who bends down and stops it
low full-toss just outside off; looking for the block hole; digs it down to long-on
oh he's attempted a lap shot to a ball which was very full outside off; Boult bowls a slow; full off-cutter and Raghuvanshi missed it completely
back of a length and angling across; Raghuvanshi guides it away square of the wicket; he picked the gap perfectly
poor bowling; you can't bowl on the pads; especially when you have a short fine leg; slower on the pads; Raghuvanshi just flicks it past the fielder to backward square leg; easy pickings for him!
full and outside leg stump; Raghuvanshi had backed away and drives it inside out to extra cover; where the fielder was at the edge of the circle
slower short delivery outside off; he's foxed him; Raghuvanshi was bit early into the shot and misses it completely
speared in full on middle and off; Raghuvanshi flicks it away to deep mid-wicket

ball_event: out Caught by Hardik Pandya!! Lord Shardul again
event_info: important wicket; full and just outside off; Rahane was looking to go inside out; but the bat turned a bit and he ended up slicing it in the air towards extra -cover; where Hardik moves backwards and takes an easy catch. Ajinkya Rahane c Hardik Pandya b Shardul Thakur 67(40) [4s-3 6s-5]
full and angling into the stumps; Singh was caught in the crease and the ball goes off the inside edge to cover
short; wide and four; width on offer and Raghuvanshi goes chasing after that; slices a thick edge and clears short third; one bounce and over the ropes
full-toss from Shardul and Raghuvanshi has missed out; backs away and picks out cover with the drive

first boundary for Rinku Singh. This was fraction short outside off; Rinku Singh rocks back in the crease and carves it through backward point. AM Ghazanfar has been quite expensive on his debut for Mumbai Indians
tossed up delivery around off; Rinku Singh drives it towards wide long-off for a couple of runs. The fielder in the deep had to cover a lot of ground; hence the batters managed to take a couple
slices this towards short third man off an outside edge. A direct-hit at the bowler's end by the fielder stationed there; but Rinku Singh was inside the crease
full and quick outside off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi goes for a reverse sweep and misses

dropped by Rohit Sharma! A tossed up delivery around middle and leg; Angkrish Raghuvanshi takes the aerial route and lofts this towards long-on. Rohit Sharma in the deep tries to grab it; but the ball pops out of his hands and lands in front of the cushions. It's a boundary infact. Rohit Sharma not happy with himself; because he sets pretty high standards in the field

much better from Angkrish Raghuvanshi! This was right into the slot. AM Ghazanfar goes full; right into the batter's slot and Angkrish Raghuvanshi launches it right over the bowler's head for half-a-dozen. 17 runs from that Ghazanfar over

more runs for KKR! A juicy full toss outside off; Rinku Singh backs away and carves this over the infield at cover-point. No one in the deep and those are easy pickings for the left-hander. MI make a few changes in the field immediately after the boundary
yorker length delivery outside off; Rinku Singh squeezes it into the off-side; straight to the fielder stationed inside the circle though
plays this towards the leg-side for a single
132.6kph; that's a well executed yorker by Trent Boult around off; Raghuvanshi opens the bat face; squeezing this through backward point
banged in short by Trent Boult and this one sails over the batter's head
flicks this away towards wide long-on for a couple of runs
Trent Boult goes full and the batter has squeezed this right past the bowler for a single
low full toss on the pads; Rinku Singh flicks this through backward square leg for a single

chance of a run-out; but it's an overthrow instead. Angkrish Raghuvanshi drives this towards extra cover and sets of for a single. Tilak goes for a direct-hit at the bowler's hit; but misses. They take an overthrow; coming back for the second

much better from Angkrish Raghuvanshi! Quality shot by the young gun. This was pitched up by the bowler around off; it was swinging away slightly; but the batsman gets underneath it; lofting it over wide long-off as the ball goes the distance. Moves into the 40s as a result of this maximum
banged in short by Shardul Thakur as Angkrish Raghuvanshi drags it towards the leg-side
slower one outside off; keeps a touch low; Rinku Singh looks to carve it away; gets beaten due to the lack of bounce and pace though

14 runs from that over! Shardul Thakur goes short outside off and provides enough width for the batter. Rinku Singh stays back in the crease and carves it uppishly over backward point. 190 up for KKR with 3 overs remaining. End of an impressive spell by Shardul Thakur as well - took three wickets tonight
50-run stand up! Goes down on his knee does Angkrish Raghuvanshi and sweeps this over backward square leg for a boundary more. He's inching closer to his fifty
lovely yorker by Jasprit Bumrah as he fires this one at Angkrish Raghuvanshi's pads. He got cramped for room due to the line and ended up squeezing it back to the bowler
low full toss on the pads; Angkrish Raghuvanshi flicks it towards wide long-on for one
tad fuller around off; Rinku Singh makes room; driving this down the track for a single
yet another fantastic yorker; well executed and Angkrish Raghuvanshi can do nothing much than digging it out towards mid-on
end of a fine over as Rinku Singh slices this through backward point for one
200 up for KKR! Drifting on the pads; Rinku Singh flicks it towards deep mid-wicket for a single
way too wide outside off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi tries to sweep this away by walking across in the crease; but fails to reach there. Comfortably called a wide

Angkrish Raghuvanshi brings up his fifty! This was pitched up by the bowler and Angkrish Raghuvanshi tried to slice it away. Ends up getting an outside edge as the ball flies right over the fielder's head. Almost goes the distance

ball_event: out Caught by Tilak Varma!! End of a crucial knock by Angkrish Raghuvanshi. The two Mumbai batters scoring fifties tonight for KKR. Earlier it was Rahane
event_info: and it's Raghuvanshi who walks back now. This was pitched up by the bowler and it was a touch slower. Angkrish Raghuvanshi loses his shape while taking the aerial route and miscues it towards long-off. Tilak Varma stationed in the deep settles under the skier and takes a safe catch. He walks back to a standing ovation from the crowd and his teammates. Angkrish Raghuvanshi c Tilak Varma b Hardik Pandya 51(29) [4s-6 6s-2]
swats this towards long-on for a single; does Ramandeep Singh
swipes this towards deep backward square leg for a single

pitched up by the bowler around middle and leg; Ramandeep Singh squeezes it towards wide long-on and takes a couple of runs. There was a chance of a third as there wasn't a fielder backing up; but Rinku sends him back. He wants to face Bumrah in the final over
a rare no ball by Jasprit Bumrah! He oversteps. Rinku Singh was making room to play this full length delivery; but he got beaten outside off. Free-hit coming up
a wide ball by Jasprit Bumrah down the leg-side; the free-hit continues

caught at deep backward square leg; but that was a free-hit. Rinku Singh moves away by a long way; but Jasprit Bumrah follows him well. Ends up bowling a full toss on the pads as Rinku Singh flicks it straight to the fielder in the deep
yet another superb yorker around off; Ramandeep Singh squeezes it towards the off-side for a single
more like it. Rinku Singh advances down the wicket and throws him off radar. Jasprit Bumrah bowls a widish full toss as Rinku Singh ends up slicing it over backward point for a boundary
in the air; but safe! A full toss on leg and Rinku Singh flicks it high up in the air towards deep square leg. Calls for two and manages to come back for it
perfect yorker at the stumps; Rinku Singh squeezes it towards long-on for one
that's a dot ball to end the innings. Was a yorker length delivery on leg and Ramandeep Singh got beaten as he tried to sweep it away. Got beaten down the leg-side and KKR end with 220/4
short of a good length and just outside off - Rickelton steers it backward ofd square on the off-side for a single
1 run; on a good length and nipping back into the pads; past Rohit's flick and rolls behind square on the on-side for a leg-bye

edged; and a fumble from Muzarabani costs them a boundary; fuller length delivery and shaping away from the left-hander; drew Rickelton into the big drive and the edge flew wide of slip. Muzarabani ran to his right and was then clumsy on the dive; allowing to ball to get away from his grasp
Vaibhav shortens the length and pushes one across the left-hander; steered straight to the fielder at cover-point

a half-appeal for caught behind; but Vaibhav wasn't interested. Was a back of a length delivery that shaped away from the left-hander and drew Rickelton into a loose poke; goes past the edge and through to the keeper
short of a good length and slanting across the left-hander - Rickelton slashes at that and misses
short of a good length and just outside off - Rohit plays close to his body and stabs it to the off-side
on a length and angling back into the right-hander; turned to the on-side
ugly and four; on a good length and just outside off - Rohit swings across the line and gets a thick inside edge; didn't miss the leg-stump by much; off the mark with a boundary
short of a good length and just outside off - Rohit Sharma arches back slightly and runs it down to third man

plenty of height; but Ryan Rickelton has enough on the lofted drive to clear mid-on - didn't get hold of the shovel; hit low on the bat and it lobbed over mid-on's head; bouncing in front of the ropes
fraction fuller and just outside off - driven straight to the fielder at cover
on a good length and just outside off - Rohit stabs it in front of cover-point and he wanted a single; sent back by his partner
clubbed; that's the Rohit of old; on a good length and just outside off - he plants his front-foot forward and then hoists it high over mid-wicket with a cross-batted swipe
fraction full and at the stumps; Rohit leans across and clips it down to long leg for a single
fuller length delivery and pushed across the left-hander; Rickelton is drawn into a loose waft and is beaten by the angle
cracking shot; overpitched and wide of off - it's right in the slot for the left-hander; Rickelton bends down onto his knee and then creams the drive over extra-cover for a maximum

back-to-back sixes for Rickelton; Vaibhav shortened the length and pushed one across the left-hander; Rickelton is quick on the pull; doesn't get hold of the shot; but he's got enough to leave the fielder in the deep at mid-wicket a mere spectator
the sixes have begun to flow; back of a length and well wide of off; Rohit backs away; opens up the off-side and then carts the drive into the stands at deep cover-point
change of pace from Muzarabani; the slower ball and it's nudged behind square on the on-side for a single
another slower short ball; looked like the cutter and Rickelton was looking to force it away off the back-foot; slices a thick edge to backward point's left
the slower ball bouncer; no pace to work with for the right-hander - Rohit has to wait as he dabbed the pull behind square on the on-side
crunched; on a length and just outside off - Rickelton stands tall and then hammers the pull over mid-on; flat and hard; and skims over the ropes for a maximum
change of pace from Muzarabani; goes for the slower off-cutter - Rickelton was looking to drive and skews a thick edge; on the bounce to short third
nicely played; tossed up just outside off - Rohit Sharma leans forward and then goes inside out over cover for a boundary; brings up MI's 50
gorgeous; this is the classy of Rohit Sharma - tossed up just outside off; he leans forward; doesn't go hard on the drive; just a chipped off-drive and he sends it sailing over long-off for a maximum
flighted delivery on middle and leg; nudged onto the on-side
easy pickings for Rohit Sharma - tossed up and drifting down leg; he gets down low and then elevates the sweep; clears backward square leg and bounces away to the ropes
flighted delivery outside off - an open-faced dab to backward point
very full and down leg; Rohit Sharma gets a thick inside edge on the flick to deep backward square leg - 15 off the over
lovely; fuller length delivery outside off - Rohit leans across; opens the face of the bat and then carves the drive over cover; sails over into the stands for a maximum
short of a good length and angling into the pads; tucked into the gap past square leg and they're back for the second
on a good length and just outside off; pushed back at the bowler
clubbed; fraction short and just outside off - Rohit is quick to pick the length early; swivels across and pulls it high over mid-wicket for a maximum
very full and just outside off - Rohit Sharma jams it down to cover
full-toss from Tyagi; Rohit swipes across the line and gets a thick inside edge; into the gap wide of mid-wicket and he's back for the second; brings up his 50th fifty+ score in IPL
tossed up just outside off; pushed down to long-off for a single
nice bit of flight outside off; defended back at the bowler
tossed up on middle; a cramped up Rohit pushes it down to long-on for a single
beautifully played; fraction fuller and just outside off - Rickelton picks the length early; gets down low onto his knee and then swipes it over mid-wicket for a maximum
slower and just outside off - Rickelton presses across and pushes it to cover
dropped short and wide of off - Rickelton finds cover with the back-foot punch
pushed through quicker from round the wicket - chopped in front of square on the off-side for a single

a bad miscue; but Rickelton gets away - Ramandeep ran back from cover; but the ball was always landing in front of him. He never looked like catching; dives and watches the ball bounce in front of him. Was tossed up slower and wider of off - had Ryan Rickelton slogging across the line and the thick edge went up
beautifully played; Rohit Sharma is playing in another world; tossed up just outside off - he stays leg-sided and then goes inside out over cover with the drive
flighted delivery on middle and leg; turned to the on-side for a single
flatter and wider of off; Rickelton goes hard on the cut and finds the man at cover
pushed through quicker by Varun; tucked to the left of long-on for a single

Rickelton is living dangerously; but he's getting the runs as well - tossed up and sliding across the left-hander; Rickelton didn't get it anywhere near the middle of the bat as he slogged across the line. Went very high; kept long-on interested all along and he can only watch it go over his head
flighted delivery on middle; punched back at the bowler
beautifully played; tossed up and drifting across the left-hander - Rickelton picks the length early; goes down low and then slog-sweep is good enough to send the ball sailing into the stands
flighted delivery on off; worked down to long-on for a single
fraction short and just outside off - punched off the back-foot to deep cover for a single
flatter and just outside off - Rickelton backs away and picks out cover-point with the punch

1 run; a high beamer and it's immediately called as a no-ball. Fast and right into Rohit's chest; he was loloking to pull and cops a blow on his gloves. They take the single and Ryan Rickelton will face the free-hit
much better by Tyagi - takes the pace off on thiks short ball; Rickelton is early into the pull and takes a blow on his body

a chance and it's put down; it's Vaibhav Arora in the deep; ran in from deep square leg; got to the ball at a comfortable height and lets it slip through. Was a short ball and Rickelton swivelled onto the pull; should be taken at this level and Ryan Rickelton continues to lead a charmed life
on a good length and just outside off - Rickelton goes hard on the drive and mistimes it to the off-side
classy; back of a length and well wide of off - Rohit waits on it; uses Tyagi's pace and then runs it off the face of the bat; past backward point and runs away to the ropes
fuller length delivery outside off; clipped off the back-foot to mid-on for a single
slower short ball on middle; slugged into the gap wide of mid-wicket and Green does well to slide across in the deep; comes back for the second
quicker through the air around middle and leg; clipped towards wide mid-on by Rohit Sharma for a single
the carnage continues at the Wankhede. Mayhem. Ryan Rickelton goes down on his knee and smokes this over wide long-on for a flat six
quicker through the air outside off; Ryan Rickelton attempts a cut and misses
flatter through the air outside off; Ryan Rickelton pats it into the off-side for one
a lot slower through the air; dips in front of the batter who squeezes it towards long-on
Mumbai Indians inching closer to an emphatic win. A short and wide ball outside off; Ryan Rickelton reaches out with a late-cut and beats the fielder at backward point. 13 runs from that over

Rohit Sharma at his best. Advances down the wicket and smashes this short ball over mid-wicket for a rollicking boundary. It was Virat Kohli last night; Rohit Sharma tonight. Two players retired from the shortest format for India; but they are absolutely belting the young bowlers

that's a gift! A high and juicy full toss outside off; Rohit Sharma waits for it to arrive and lofts it over deep extra cover for a flat six. Poor bowling by Vaibhav Arora. KKR bowlers have run out of ideas. Staring at a massive defeat. Even 250 wouldn't have been enough; with the bowling of this quality
slices this full toss over backward point for a single
on the shorter side as Ryan Rickelton pulls this towards deep mid-wicket for one
banged in short from round the wicket and this ball sails over the batter's head outside off. An easy call for the umpire

ball_event: out Caught by Anukul Roy!! End of a spectacular knock by Rohit Sharma. And it required a spectacular effort in the field to get rid of him. He walks back to the pavilion to a standing ovation from the crowd and his teammates
event_info: does the Hitman. This was a juicy full toss outside off and Rohit Sharma tried to whip it across the line. Miscues it over wide mid-on and Anukul Roy charges behind from inside the circle. For a moment it looked like; this will elude him; but he puts in a dive running backwards and holds onto a superb catch eventually. The job has been done though as the required run rate is well within MI's reach. Rohit Sharma c Anukul Roy b Vaibhav Arora 78(38) [4s-6 6s-6]
Suryakumar Yadav is off the mark in style. Shuffles across in the crease and scoops the back of a length delivery over short fine leg. Doesn't waste any time to get going does the impact sub
quicker through the air outside off; Ryan Rickelton gets beaten as the ball skids along the deck
dragged towards long-on by Ryan Rickelton for a single
dragged towards the leg-side for one by Suryakumar Yadav
drifting on the pads; Ryan Rickelton flicks it through the leg-side for a single
fired outside off; misses the tramline and that's a wide ball
low full toss on middle and leg; flicked to wide long-on

Ryan Rickelton moves into the 70s. A tossed up delivery outside off; slightly wide and Ryan Rickelton picks the bones out of it. Goes down on his knee to reach for it and smokes it over long-off for half-a-dozen. Only 58 runs required in 7 overs; they've got 9 wickets remaining
helicopter flick by Suryakumar Yadav. This was on the fuller side and Suryakumar Yadav flicked it away to the deep mid-wicket fence
short and wide outside off; Suryakumar Yadav's cut finds the fielder at short third man. A single taken
fraction short on middle and leg; Ryan Rickelton drags it through the leg-side for a single
tad short outside off; Suryakumar Yadav carves it through the off-side for one
goes wide outside off and misses the tramline by a long way
quicker through the air at the stumps; nudged down the pitch by Ryan Rickelton

that has been slapped. This was slightly full outside off; Ryan Rickelton slaps it uppishly and manages to beat the fielder sprinting across at long-off. No chance of stopping that as it was absolutely powered by the southpaw. If he keeps playing like this; de Kock will have to warm the bench for most part of the season
cheeky! Short ball outside off; Suryakumar Yadav arches back in the crease and guides it over short third man. Comfortably manages to clear the fielders inside the circle

ball_event: out Caught by Rinku Singh!! That looked like a maximum for a moment
event_info: but SKY has been caught at the edge of the boundary at deep mid-wicket. It's Rinku Singh who takes a safe catch. This was a short ball and Suryakumar Yadav went for a pull; however; he doesn't get enough distance to clear the boundary. A rare moment of relief for the Knight Riders bowlers. Given the kind of batting to follow; they can't afford to breathe. Suryakumar Yadav c Rinku Singh b Kartik Tyagi 16(8) [4s-3]

that's the first ball he's facing and he has smashed it away nonchalantly. Advances down the wicket and bludgeons this through wide mid-off as the ball races away to the fence. Mumbai Indians after a long; long time are probably going to win their first game of the season
back of a length outside off; keeps a touch low; Tilak Varma swings and misses
slower short ball outside off; Tilak Varma swings and misses
yorker length ball outside off; Tilak Varma tries to squeeze it out; gets an outside edge that flies towards short third
short and wide outside off; Ryan Rickelton slaps it towards cover

ball_event: out Ryan Rickelton Run Out!! 1 run completed. Another superb effort in the field by Anukul Roy. The bowlers are under the pump
event_info: but the fielding by Anukul Roy has been top-notch tonight. This was slapped towards long-off by the batsman and he took a single. Wanted the second as well; but Tilak sends him back. Anukul fires a flat throw at the bowler's end and the batsman was outside his crease. Muzarabani was in his way for a moment; hence Rickelton couldn't get back in. Not his fault; but a fine knock by the opener comes to an end. Ryan Rickelton run out (Anukul Roy) 81(43) [4s-4 6s-8]
sliced through the off-side for one
short and wide outside off; Hardik Pandya smashes this through covers to get going with a rollicking boundary
back-to-back boundaries! This was short and wide outside off; Hardik Pandya carves this through point for four more. Not wasting any time; he wants to get done with the chase quickly
another loose delivery; pretty short and wide outside off; Hardik Pandya slaps it towards the fielder at cover
short ball around middle and leg; Tilak Varma swivel-pulls this towards deep mid-wicket on the bounce
on a length around off; Hardik Pandya looks to punch this through the off-side; gets an inside edge onto the pads though. A single taken as the ball dribbles away
full and wide outside off; Tilak Varma goes for a drive and misses
1 run; KKR have lost a review! A length delivery around leg; that skids along the deck and strikes him on the pads. They take a review; but it was pitching outside leg; confirm the replays..
slapped to fine leg by Hardik Pandya for a single
scooped! A full toss by Kartik Tyagi and Tilak Varma has scooped this over short fine leg to end the over with a boundary. A huge cheer by the MI crowd as they need only 20 runs more
short of a length outside off; Hardik Pandya attempts a cut and misses
banged in short from round the wicket; Hardik Pandya loses his shape as he goes for a pull with lack of conviction; ends up miscuing it towards mid-wicket for one
down to run-a-ball now. Short and wide outside off; Tilak Varma slashes hard at it and the top edge flies over the infield at short third man
low full toss by Vaibhav Arora as Tilak Varma squeezes it down the ground
short ball outside off; Hardik Pandya carves it through the off-side for one
right into the blockhole; Tilak Varma tries to squeeze it out and ends up getting an inside edge that beats the fielder at short fine leg. Probably smashed into his shoe as well
absolutely smashes this flat ball to long-off for a single
that was pretty short and Tilak Varma clips it towards mid-on for one
tries to smash this short ball away; ends up mistiming this through mid-wicket for one

ball_event: out Caught by (sub)Manish Pandey!! A wicket for Narine
event_info: but it's too late now. This was a slower through the air around off and Tilak Varma tried to smash it away. Loses his shape; miscues it towards long-on; and Manish Pandey in the deep takes a safe catch. Tilak Varma c (sub)Manish Pandey b Sunil Narine 20(14) [4s-4];
flatter through the air around off; knocked to long-off for one

scores level! Hardik Pandya picks the length early; rocks back in the crease and pummels this away towards the wide long-on boundary. Struck it powerfully to beat the fielder chasing it across in the deep

Mumbai Indians win their first game of the season after a long; long time - they've broken the jinx finally. A flatter one around off; Naman Dhir stays put and bludgeons it over mid-off. A convincing 6-wicket win for Mumbai Indians with 5 balls to spare
